query:
-- Total de gestantes e quantas baixaram o app
SELECT
  COUNT(DISTINCT g.id) AS total_gestantes,
  COUNT(DISTINCT s.gestante_id) AS baixaram_app,
  COUNT(DISTINCT g.id) - COUNT(DISTINCT s.gestante_id) AS nao_baixaram_app,
  ROUND(COUNT(DISTINCT s.gestante_id) * 100.0 / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT g.id), 0), 1) AS pct_baixaram
FROM gestantes g
LEFT JOIN sessoes_gestante s ON s.gestante_id = g.id;

-- Por clínica
SELECT
  g.clinica_id,
  COUNT(DISTINCT g.id) AS total,
  COUNT(DISTINCT s.gestante_id) AS baixaram,
  ROUND(COUNT(DISTINCT s.gestante_id) * 100.0 / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT g.id), 0), 1) AS pct
FROM gestantes g
LEFT JOIN sessoes_gestante s ON s.gestante_id = g.id
GROUP BY g.clinica_id
ORDER BY pct DESC;

-- Gestantes que baixaram: quantas tiveram consulta nos últimos 30 dias
SELECT
  'Baixou app' AS grupo,
  COUNT(DISTINCT g.id) AS total_grupo,
  COUNT(DISTINCT c.gestante_id) AS com_consulta_recente,
  ROUND(COUNT(DISTINCT c.gestante_id) * 100.0 / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT g.id), 0), 1) AS pct_consulta_recente
FROM gestantes g
INNER JOIN sessoes_gestante s ON s.gestante_id = g.id
LEFT JOIN consultas c ON c.gestante_id = g.id
  AND c.data_consulta >= NOW() - INTERVAL '30 days'
UNION ALL
SELECT
  'Não baixou app' AS grupo,
  COUNT(DISTINCT g.id) AS total_grupo,
  COUNT(DISTINCT c.gestante_id) AS com_consulta_recente,
  ROUND(COUNT(DISTINCT c.gestante_id) * 100.0 / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT g.id), 0), 1) AS pct_consulta_recente
FROM gestantes g
LEFT JOIN sessoes_gestante s ON s.gestante_id = g.id
LEFT JOIN consultas c ON c.gestante_id = g.id
  AND c.data_consulta >= NOW() - INTERVAL '30 days'
WHERE s.gestante_id IS NULL;
